one_time_description: Gain on sale of tangible capital assets
economic_notes: Nation operates Redstone Gas Bar, Tsi'deldel Timber Development LP (forestry), Crazy Horse Energy Drink operations, and holds investments in River West Forest Products, Eniyud Community Forests, Cariboo Indian Enterprises, and Central Chilcotin Rehabilitation. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with uncertain impact.
notes: Auditor firm name not clearly stated - identified only as 'Chartered Professional Accountants' from Prince George, BC. Fiscal year is 2020 not 2024 as per document. Consolidates 7 entities including Tsi'deldel Development Corporation, Tsi'deldel Limited Partnership, Crazy Horse Energy Drink Ltd and LP, Redstone Gas Bar Ltd and LP, and Ts'iDel Del Resources Ltd. Tsi'deldel Timber Development LP accounted for by modified equity method (GBE). Restricted cash of $445,283 includes social housing ($38,580) and gaming ($406,703). Net tangible capital assets per schedule: net book value 2020 = $8,690,545 (16,873,308 cost less 8,182,763 accumulated amortization). Ottawa Trust Funds of $1,044,961 included in accumulated surplus. Social Housing budget vs actual shows large variance due to deferred capital project funding. ISC confirmation amount differs from financial statement amount due to deferred revenue timing.
